# Spec: generate-sbom.md §File-based hashes
# Error conditions (per spec):
#   - missing file -> hard error
#   - 'file' pointed at directory -> hard error
#   - unsupported algorithm in file/path form -> error (only SHA-256, SHA-512)
#   - empty-match directory (filter excludes everything) -> hard error
#
# EXPECTED GAP: today these surface only as WARNINGS via gsbom.Generate's
# `warnings` slice; the command still writes a partial SBOM and exits 0.

mkdir src

# --- Missing file ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i missing_file.json -o out_missing.json
# Warning printed, but run succeeds (gap):
stderr 'failed to hash file'
# Spec-correct would be: exit != 0. This is NOT true today, documenting the gap.

# --- file points at a directory ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i dir_as_file.json -o out_dir.json
stderr 'use .path. for directories|is a directory'

# --- Unsupported algo (SHA-1) with file reference ---
cp hello src/hello.txt
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i bad_algo.json -o out_algo.json
stderr 'unsupported hash algorithm'

# --- Empty-match directory (no .xx files present) ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i empty_dir.json -o out_empty.json
stderr 'no matching files|failed to hash directory'

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- missing_file.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "x", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "file": "./does-not-exist.c"}] }
  ]
}
-- dir_as_file.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "x", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "file": "./src"}] }
  ]
}
-- bad_algo.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "x", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-1", "file": "./src/hello.txt"}] }
  ]
}
-- empty_dir.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "x", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "path": "./src/", "extensions": ["xx"]}] }
  ]
}
-- hello --
hello
